decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to its base_record_id entity_nyc-dot. The registry card matches: entity_name 'New York City Department of Transportation', entity_type 'agency'. No different record is a better match.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The New York City Department of Transportation (NYC DOT) logo

decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to its base_record_id entity_mta-nyct. The observation entity_type 'agency' matches entity_mta-nyct (agency), not entity_mta-entity-update-2025 (transit_authority). do_not_merge_pairs confirm parent MTA ≠ NYCT subsidiary.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The MTA logo, consisting of the letters 'MTA' in white inside a black circle.

decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to its base_record_id entity_community-board-9-manhattan. Other CB9 registry cards are for Brooklyn and Queens boroughs—distinct entities.

Observation already resolves to its base_record_id entity_betterbuses-program-mar2025. Both share entity_name 'BETTERBUSES' and entity_type 'program'. The registry card already lists this source_id and has entity_betterbuses-cb9-jun2025 as an alias.
